description:
Open Rails: free train simulator that supports the world's largest range of digital content.



## What's Changed

### Bug Fixes

- Fix: Crash when using Camera 8 and F9. by @mbm-OR in #1163
- Fix: F9 crashes with a front coupled single steam locomotive by Csantucci. by @mbm-OR in #1164
- Fix: RunActivity slow to terminate because of long sleep in Host Process by @rwf-rr in #1167
- Fix exception when exiting with MapForm or SoundDebugForm open. by @rwf-rr in #1168
- no internet connection is available, not possible to open the Menu Content Form by
  @sweiland-openrails in #1171
- Fix: Avoid fatal type-initialization exception at start-up by @cjakeman in #1177
- Fix/avoid type initialization exception - 2nd try by @cjakeman in #1184
